inflation.title: Inflation (CPI)
inflation.body: Used to relativize performance in real terms. Does not affect nominal cash flows.

regime.title: Rental tax regime
regime.body:
LMNP Real: deductible depreciation (property + works).
Micro-BIC: 50% flat deduction.
Bare rental: actual expenses, no depreciation.

tauxActu.title: Discount rate (NPV)
tauxActu.body: Rate used to calculate Net Present Value. Represents the opportunity cost of capital.

rendAlt.title: ETF / alternative investment return
rendAlt.body: Net annual return on the ETF portfolio. Historically ~7-8% gross ETF World, ~5-6% net after tax and inflation.

budgetMensuel.title: Monthly housing + investment budget
budgetMensuel.body: Fixed monthly envelope. The surplus not consumed by real costs is automatically invested in ETF.

investirSurplus.title: Invest surplus in ETF
investirSurplus.body: If enabled: the difference between the monthly budget and real outflows is invested in ETF. The dashed line = pure ETF reference scenario.

apportETF.title: Pure ETF reference contribution
apportETF.body: Starting capital for the pure ETF scenario. No property purchase — contribution + monthly surplus are compounded in ETF.

prixAchat.title: Net purchase price
prixAchat.body: Price paid to the seller, excluding notary and agency fees.

fraisNotaire.title: Notary fees
fraisNotaire.body: 7-8% for existing properties, 2-3% for new builds. Auto: 8% × purchase price.

travaux.title: Renovation works
travaux.body: Under LMNP Real, depreciable over several years.

fraisAgence.title: Buyer's agent fees
fraisAgence.body: Agent commission paid by the buyer.

apport.title: Down payment
apport.body: Own capital invested. Reduces the loan amount but also the leverage.

taux.title: Nominal interest rate
taux.body: Nominal loan rate. Auto mode: France average rates (updated 05/2026) — 7y 3.25% · 10y 3.30% · 15y 3.45% · 20y 3.55% · 25y 3.70%.

duree.title: Loan duration
duree.body: Longer = lower monthly payment but higher total cost.

revalBien.title: Property appreciation
revalBien.body: Annual increase assumption. ~2-3%/yr historical average in France.

fraisVente.title: Selling agent fees
fraisVente.body: 3-7% of sale price. Negotiable or avoidable via private sale.

loyer.title: Gross monthly rent
loyer.body: Excluding recoverable charges. Key driver of profitability.

vacance.title: Vacancy rate
vacance.body: 5-8% in tight markets, 10-15% in rural areas.

taxeFonciere.title: Property tax
taxeFonciere.body: Annual local tax. Varies significantly by municipality. Auto: 0.5% × purchase price.

fraisGestion.title: Property management
fraisGestion.body: 6-9% incl. tax of collected rents if using an agency.

provision.title: Maintenance reserve
provision.body: Precautionary savings. Rule of thumb: ~1% of value/yr. Auto: 0.5% × purchase price.

revalLoyer.title: Rent increase
revalLoyer.body: Capped by the rent index. 1-4%/yr depending on inflation.

impotPV.title: Capital gains tax
impotPV.body: 19% income tax + 17.2% social contributions = 36.2%. Progressive allowances. Primary residence exempt.

loyerPerso.title: Current rent you pay
loyerPerso.body: Monthly rent you pay. Rental mode: subtracted from CF. Primary: savings if you buy.
loyerPerso.code:
Real CF (rental) = Rental CF − Personal rent
Savings (primary) = Personal rent − Monthly payment

revalLoyerPerso.title: Market rent revaluation %/yr
revalLoyerPerso.body: Annual increase of your rent. ~1-3%/yr indexed.

taxeFonciereRP.title: Property tax (primary residence)
taxeFonciereRP.body: Same tax as for rental. No housing tax since 2023 for primary residences. Auto: 0.5% × purchase price.

provisionRP.title: Maintenance reserve (primary)
provisionRP.body: Annual maintenance budget. ~1% of property value. Auto: 0.5% × purchase price.

cf1.title: Cumulative real estate cash-flow — 30 yrs
cf1.desc: Net cumulative flows from the property only. Rental: rents − expenses − mortgage − taxes − personal rent. Primary: rent saved − expenses − mortgage.

pat.title: Total wealth — 30 yrs
pat.desc: Property equity + ETF portfolio built from monthly surplus. Dashed line = pure ETF reference scenario.

cf3.title: Net annual cash-flow (after tax)
cf3.desc: The jump at loan end is normal: monthly payments stop.

vb.title: Property value over time
vb.desc: Estimated market value based on the configured appreciation rate.

revente.title: Net profit by sale year
revente.desc: Net gain if you sell this year. Primary residence exempt from capital gains. Dashed = pure ETF reference.

amort.title: Annual loan breakdown
amort.desc: At the start most goes to interest, then the capital portion increases progressively.

kpisTable.title: Comparison table — Rental regime:
kpisTable.desc: Total wealth = property equity + ETF from surplus. Pure ETF = contribution + full budget invested without buying.

auto.tooltipOn: Auto mode active — click to override manually
auto.tooltipOff: Auto mode off — click to enable
auto.zeroGuard: Computed value is 0 — check the purchase price
auto.hint: Fields marked A are auto-calculated. Click A to switch to manual.
